root_cause.narrowest_proven_boundary: Win32 process PID 2908 was returned by Start-Process, but the child produced no PowerShell engine-start event, no bootstrap or workload file, and no stdout/stderr byte before it ceased to exist.
root_cause.most_supported_cause: The child inherited the Windows OpenSSH session process tree and was terminated when the launcher SSH session closed.
support: The launcher PowerShell engine PID 6496 stopped at 2026-07-15T07:26:57.5732657Z.
OpenSSH recorded the corresponding client disconnect at 2026-07-15T07:26:57.5960876Z, 22.8219 milliseconds later.
Windows PowerShell and PowerShell Operational logs contain no engine-start record for the deployed worker command or PID 2908.
The .running directory was empty and both redirected streams were zero-byte files created at 2026-07-15T07:26:57.4950010Z.
Later non-MT5 integration canaries demonstrated that WMI-owned launch survives the same SSH boundary, while the historical Start-Process child did not.
remaining_possibilities: OpenSSH session teardown terminated the not-yet-initialized child process.
A different pre-engine Windows process termination occurred in the same 23 millisecond interval.
missing_evidence: Security 4688/4689 process creation and termination audit records were not available.
No repository lifecycle record stored the child Process.ExitCode before the launcher exited.
No kernel process trace or crash dump existed for PID 2908.

launch_reconstruction.windows_launcher_host_application: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File C:\NoraEvidence\Phase2\acl-audits\20260714T232525Z\campaign-tool\cabff937d813fefedda8e4d170487dd598e9730f82222f788534bc36d75161bf\phase2-evidence-runner.ps1 -Mode cache-preflight-launch -RunId p2offgdaxi20260715e -Symbol GDAXI -EvidenceRoot C:\NoraEvidence\Phase2

shell_boundary_quoting.bash: The remote PowerShell command was one double-quoted SSH argument; embedded escaped double quotes surrounded each repository value.
shell_boundary_quoting.windows_openssh: OpenSSH passed the rendered powershell command to the Windows command processor. The event-log HostApplication shows values without retained quote characters because none contained spaces.
shell_boundary_quoting.powershell_start_process: Start-Process joined the ArgumentList tokens. Every worker argument path was under C:\NoraEvidence\Phase2 and contained no spaces, so quote loss did not alter token boundaries.

worker_inherited_working_directory.proof: inferred from the SSH launcher default and Start-Process inheritance; the child never initialized far enough to record it

launch_reconstruction.environment_recovery: The exact child environment was not independently serialized. Start-Process inherited the launcher environment; the forensic capture records the same Windows identity environment at collection time, including APPDATA=C:\Users\Gasper\AppData\Roaming.
